scripts.typecheck: npm run mobile:typecheck && npm run relay:typecheck && npm run bridge:typecheck
scripts.test: npm run mobile:test -- --runInBand && npm run relay:test && npm run bridge:test
scripts.build: npm run mobile:office:build && npm run bridge:build
scripts.mobile:start: npm run mobile:prepare && npm run --workspace clawket start
scripts.mobile:ios: npm run mobile:prepare && npm run --workspace clawket ios
scripts.mobile:android: npm run mobile:prepare && npm run --workspace clawket android
scripts.mobile:sync:native: npm run --workspace clawket prebuild:clean && npm run --workspace clawket pod-install:ios
scripts.mobile:dev:ios: npm run mobile:prepare && npm run --workspace clawket dev
scripts.mobile:dev:android: npm run mobile:prepare && npm run --workspace clawket dev:android
scripts.mobile:dev:macos: npm run mobile:prepare && npm run --workspace clawket dev:macos
scripts.mobile:build:macos: npm run mobile:prepare && npm run --workspace clawket build:macos
scripts.mobile:archive:macos: npm run mobile:prepare && npm run --workspace clawket archive:macos
scripts.mobile:export:macos: npm run mobile:prepare && npm run --workspace clawket export:macos
scripts.mobile:build:android:pro-temp: npm run mobile:prepare && npm run --workspace clawket build:android:pro-temp
scripts.mobile:office:build: npm --prefix apps/mobile/office-game install && npm --prefix apps/mobile/office-game run build
scripts.relay:typecheck: npm run --workspace @clawket/shared typecheck && npm run --workspace @clawket/registry-worker typecheck && npm run --workspace @clawket/relay-worker typecheck
scripts.relay:test: npm run --workspace @clawket/shared test && npm run --workspace @clawket/registry-worker test && npm run --workspace @clawket/relay-worker test
scripts.bridge:build: npm run --workspace @clawket/bridge-core build && npm run --workspace @clawket/bridge-runtime build && npm run --workspace @p697/clawket build
scripts.bridge:test: npm run --workspace @clawket/bridge-core test && npm run --workspace @clawket/bridge-runtime test && npm run --workspace @p697/clawket test
scripts.bridge:typecheck: npm run --workspace @clawket/bridge-core build && npm run --workspace @clawket/bridge-runtime build && npm run --workspace @p697/clawket typecheck
